description: You are a biomedical robotics engineer developing a slip-detection algorithm for a robotic prosthetic hand. Upgrade the Webots simulation (prosthetic_hand_test.wbt) to enable tactile feedback and stable grasping physics for validation. Configure the WorldInfo basicTimeStep to 16 or lower. Enable physics for the 'TEST_EGG' Solid with a mass of 0.05 kg. Configure 'INDEX_TIP' and 'THUMB_TIP' as TouchSensor nodes using the "force-3d" type and a resolution of 0.001. Save the upgraded world to /home/ga/Desktop/prosthetic_grasp_test.wbt.
